description_long: This is a glossy black vase with a bulbous body, a flared rim, and a sturdy, flared base. It features two thick, rounded handles on opposite sides, providing both decorative and functional elements. The front of the vase is adorned with a raised, detailed motif of green holly leaves and three red berries, adding a festive and ornamental touch. The surface is highly reflective, giving it a sleek and polished appearance. The vase appears to be made primarily of ceramic or porcelain, with the interior likely hollow and filled with air. Its overall design suggests it is both decorative and capable of holding flowers or other items.
description: Glossy black vase with two rounded handles and a raised holly leaf and berry motif on the front. Highly reflective and decorative, suitable for display or holding items.
description_view_0: Front view showing the holly leaf and berry motif and both handles clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible motif, showing the vase's glossy black surface and one handle in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both handles and the plain, glossy black surface without any decorative motif.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the holly motif just visible on the edge and one handle in profile.
attribute_ornamentation: raised holly leaf and berry motif
